string 2:
I know this is out of the blue, but you and I need to cross
blades.
Thanks for the speedy decision. I like that about you.

I can see why you would wonder that. But... this fight has
to happen.

You aren't ready? Okay, then come back when you feel up for
a fight.

I've had a strange feeling ever since I saw Beelzemon, one I
can't quite put into words.

If I'm to alleviate this feeling, I figure I must face you
in battle.

You hang with the strongest Digimon I know! Beat you and my
mind'll be put at ease.

Help me prove that nothing can lead me astray. ...Ready?
Prepare to be defeated!

I lost! I have to get stronger if I'm going to be ready for
the final battle to come!

That feeling held me back. I have to shut it away until I'm
strong! This'll have to wait!

Thank you for fighting me. I've come to terms with the
feeling inside me.

It's... I don't know... It's like something is... surging
within me!

...Wait. What? Nothing happened. And I felt so certain
something was going to, too.
But, oh, well. My mind is clear now!

Here. Take this as thanks! Now, let's both get ready for the
final battle!
